SELECT value, toTypeName(value), reinterpretAsUInt8(value) AS reinterpreted_value, toTypeName(reinterpreted_value) FROM test_reinterpret;
SELECT reinterpretAsUInt8(toInt8(value)) AS converted_value FROM test_reinterpret WHERE value > 254;
SELECT reinterpretAsUInt8(value) AS test_value FROM (SELECT value FROM test_reinterpret WHERE value < 0 UNION SELECT 255);
SELECT reinterpretAsUInt8(number) AS uint8_value FROM numbers(10);
SELECT reinterpretAsUInt8(cast(value AS Int32)) AS reinterpreted_float_value FROM float_test_table;
WITH (SELECT reinterpretAsUInt8(message) FROM (SELECT toString(value) AS message FROM float_test_table)) AS subquery SELECT * FROM subquery;
SELECT reinterpretAsUInt8(256) AS reinterpret_value, reinterpretAsUInt8(-1) AS negative_value;
SELECT value, reinterpretAsUInt8(value) AS reinterpreted_value FROM (SELECT -10 AS value UNION SELECT 10 UNION SELECT 1024) AS union_table;
SELECT reinterpretAsUInt8(254) AS valid_value, reinterpretAsUInt8(255) AS edge_value, reinterpretAsUInt8(256) AS overflow_value;
CREATE TABLE combined_test (string_value String, int_value Int16);
SELECT string_value, reinterpretAsUInt8(toInt8(int_value)) AS uint8_converted FROM combined_test LEFT JOIN test_reinterpret ON int_value = value;
